name: @seanchatmangpt/pictl
description: Process Mining in WebAssembly - High-Speed Algorithms for Browser and Node.js

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:nodejs && npm run build:web
scripts.build:optimized: npm run build && wasm-opt pkg/pictl_bg.wasm -O4 -o pkg/pictl_bg.wasm || echo 'wasm-opt not available, skipping post-processing'
scripts.build:browser: RUSTFLAGS="-C target-feature=+simd128" wasm-pack build --target bundler --features browser
scripts.build:edge: RUSTFLAGS="-C target-feature=+simd128" wasm-pack build --target bundler --features edge
scripts.build:fog: RUSTFLAGS="-C target-feature=+simd128" wasm-pack build --target bundler --features fog
scripts.build:iot: RUSTFLAGS="-C target-feature=+simd128" wasm-pack build --target bundler --features iot
scripts.build:cloud: RUSTFLAGS="-C target-feature=+simd128" wasm-pack build --target bundler --features cloud
scripts.build:all-profiles: npm run build:browser && npm run build:edge && npm run build:fog && npm run build:iot && npm run build:cloud
scripts.test: npm run build:nodejs && npm run test:unit && npm run build:web && npm run test:browser
scripts.lint: npm run format:check && npm run type:check
scripts.dev: cargo watch -s 'cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && RUSTFLAGS="-C target-feature=+simd128" wasm-pack build --target bundler --dev' -w src
scripts.bench:build: npm run build:nodejs && npm run bench
scripts.bench:browser: npm run build:web && vitest run --browser chromium __tests__/benchmarks/browser.test.ts
scripts.bench:browser:ci: npm run build:web && CI_MODE=true vitest run --browser chromium __tests__/benchmarks/browser.test.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build:all && npm run lint && npm run test

author: Sean Chatman <info@chatmangpt.com>
